name: STR Mechanical — Greenville
heroHeading: Success Through Reputation. Built for Greenville.
heroParagraph: Our Greenville team keeps the Upstate's commercial buildings running — HVAC, building controls, planned maintenance, and emergency service, backed by a national platform.
addressTodo: Office is physically in Liberty, SC (Greenville-Spartanburg metro / Upstate). Adam refers to it as the 'Greenville' office — confirm preferred public-facing city name.
mapCoordsTodo: Approximated from build-directory.js (Liberty centroid). Refine to street-level if available.

industriesLead: We serve the buildings that keep the Upstate and Western Carolinas running — across healthcare, industrial, education, hospitality, and beyond.
photoStripTodo: Source SC/Upstate-specific shots; compress drone-aerial + jobsite to ~500 KB before launch

services.title: HVAC Services
services.body: Comprehensive heating, ventilation, and air conditioning service for commercial and industrial facilities.

services.title: Building Controls
services.body: Design, installation, and integration of building automation systems that reduce operating costs.

services.title: Commercial Refrigeration
services.body: Walk-in coolers and freezers, reach-ins, ice machines, refrigerated display cases — service, repair, and 24/7 emergency response.

services.title: Planned Maintenance
services.body: Programmatic service plans with predictable scheduling and asset-level tracking.

services.title: Emergency Services
services.body: 24 / 7 emergency response — staffed dispatch and an on-call technician roster, always available.

services.title: Project Support
services.body: Design-build, retrofit, and equipment-upgrade projects delivered by tradespeople who know the install — and the service after.
